name: Overhead Barbell Press
description: Compound vertical press targeting primarily the anterior delts with assistance from lateral and triceps.

name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
description: Vertical press with dumbbells allowing greater range of motion and balanced shoulder development.

name: Arnold Press
description: Rotational dumbbell press that engages all three deltoid heads through a twisting motion.

name: Front Raise
description: Isolation lift raising arms forward to target the anterior deltoids.

name: Lateral Raise
description: Classic isolation movement raising arms sideways to emphasize the lateral (medial) deltoids.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
description: Lateral raise using cables for constant tension throughout the movement.

name: Bent-Over Lateral Raise
description: Performed bent at the waist, raising arms to target the posterior deltoids.

name: Face Pull
description: Cable exercise pulling rope toward face to target rear delts and upper back; excellent for posture.

name: Reverse Pec Deck Fly
description: Machine-based rear delt isolation exercise, also called reverse fly.

name: Upright Row
description: Vertical pulling motion elevating elbows to target lateral and anterior delts (use caution with form).

name: Landmine Press
description: Angled overhead press using landmine bar; shoulder-friendly with anterior and lateral emphasis.

name: Single-Arm Cable Front Raise
description: Unilateral front raise using cable for controlled anterior delt activation.

name: Leaning Lateral Raise
description: Standing sideways to a bench and leaning for greater stretch and contraction on lateral delts.

name: Rear Delt Cable Row
description: Bent-over cable row with high-to-low pull targeting rear delts with scapular retraction.

name: Scaption (Scapular Plane Raise)
description: Raise arms at 30-45° angle between front and side to target all deltoid heads with joint-friendly motion.
